text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Meisho Doto is convinced that with some
intensive summer training, winning against the
previous generation could become a reality.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I've noticed her growth stagnating, and I can't
quite share her optimism. Can we really break
past this ever-looming ceiling?
